mapper.insert: insert into crm_lead ( customer_name, phone, company_name, source, status, owner_id, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, remark ) values ( #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{companyName}, #{source}, #{status}, #{ownerId}, #{lastFollowTime}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select id, customer_name, phone, company_name, source, status, owner_id, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, remark, create_time, update_time from crm_lead order by id desc
select id, customer_name, phone, company_name, source, status, owner_id, last_follow_time, next_follow_time, remark, create_time, update_time from crm_lead where id = #{id}
